allow:
Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Update session handoff with dashboard routing resolution

Documented the investigation and fix for the demo user 404 issue.
Root cause was React Query cache not being invalidated after login.
Solution was to force full page reload.

Also documented discovery that role-based dashboards were already
fully implemented with complete functionality for all persona types.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix incorrect ''Super Admin'' label for demo users

Root cause: Zustand persist middleware was caching old state in localStorage.
Users who previously opened the app had stale currentUserRole values persisted,
causing incorrect role labels to display.

Changes:
- Added version: 1 to store persistence config to invalidate old cached state
- Added fallback display for role label while loading
- Verified demo user roles are correctly assigned in database

Demo users have correct roles:
- Emily (management_manager)
- Sarah (poa_board_member)
- James (homeowner)
- Alex (poa_board_contributor)

Users should clear their browser cache or the app will auto-migrate on next load.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add known issues to session handoff for triage

Documented two issues for next session:
1. Sign out race condition - user A shows after logging in as user B
2. Homeowner role permissions - James seeing unauthorized content

Both issues have investigation checklists and priority levels.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add public contact form and improve calendar permissions

New features:
- Public contact form endpoint (POST /api/public/contact)
- Contact form and demo request email templates
- Sends to POA_CONTACT_EMAIL with proper formatting

Improvements:
- Calendar/events middleware now allows more roles to access
- Board members, managers, reps can view calendar
- Read-only access for homeowners and contributors
- Updated DemoPersonaSelect styling
- Updated PricingPage layout

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix duplicate tenants in community switcher dropdown

When a user has multiple roles on the same tenant (e.g., both
management_manager and account_admin on Apex Management), the
tenant was appearing multiple times in the dropdown.

Fixed by deduping tenants by ID before storing in availableTenants.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add event visibility control and calendar access for all roles

New features:
- Events now have isPublic flag (default true) to control visibility
- Public events visible to all community members (homeowners)
- Board-only events visible only to board members, managers, and staff
- Visibility toggle in EventModal under Reminders tab

Access changes:
- Calendar now visible to all roles: homeowners, board members,
  contributors, reps, managers, account admins, super admins
- Homeowners see only public events for their community
- Board/staff see all events (public + board-only)

Database:
- Added is_public column to events table (default true)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix missing isAuthenticated middleware on event routes

All event API routes were missing the isAuthenticated middleware,
causing 401 errors because req.userId was not being set.

Added isAuthenticated before requireEventsAccess on all event routes:
- /api/events/types
- /api/events
- /api/events/calendar
- /api/events/:id
- /api/events/:id/complete
- /api/events/:id/cancel
- /api/events/:eventId/attendees
- /api/events/:eventId/documents
- /api/events/:eventId/applications

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix userId extraction in requireEventsAccess middleware

The middleware was checking req.userId which was never set.
Now properly extracts userId from session (demo users) or
OAuth claims (Replit auth users).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add self-service community join and homeowner verification

Features:
- Self-service community registration: users can search for communities
  with allowPublicApplications=true and join as unverified homeowners
- Homeowner verification system: track isVerified, verifiedAt, and
  verifiedByApplicationId on user roles
- New JoinCommunity page for browsing and joining communities
- SuperAdminDashboard component for system-wide admin views

Schema changes:
- tenants: added allowPublicApplications flag (default true)
- userTenantRoles: added isVerified, verifiedAt, verifiedByApplicationId
- communityTiers: renamed includedCredits to includedAiCredits

API changes:
- GET /api/public/search now filters by allowPublicApplications
- POST /api/public/communities/:tenantId/join - join as unverified homeowner
- storage.searchPublicCommunities() - search joinable communities
- storage.selfServiceJoinCommunity() - create unverified homeowner role
- storage.verifyHomeowner() / isHomeownerVerified() - verification helpers
- storage.getUserEffectiveRole() - get user''s effective role at tenant
- storage.getPropertiesByRole() - get properties by specific role

Improvements:
- getManagedProperties() now properly handles management_rep role
- Expanded role-based access for workflow designer and templates
- Updated SubscriptionManagement with improved UI
- ProfileSettings enhancements
- Community settings card updates

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
